description: A stylish, fashionable choice from catwalk. With it's sleek design and stylish embellishments, this pair looks great with party wear or day wear.  The beaded straps will perfectly complement both ethnic and Western outfits.UpperSoft footbed, lightly padded for absolute comfortThong styled beaded straps with a rubber toe separatorPrint on the footbedOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with branded grooves and a floral lug at the heelSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
